metadata.title:
v. v. P. SHOWS
PETTY SPITE

REFUSES TO STOP CARS AT
CORNER BECAUSE CITIZENS
THERE FORCED COMPANY
TO LOWER TRACKS TO-
GRADE.

pages.raw_text:
Corporation Counsel Hamblen
and the street committee of the
council was instructed last night to
investigate the complaint against
the Washington Water Power Co.,
made by 63 petitioners, that the
company refuses to stop its cars
at the corner of Providence av. and
Martha st. The petition recites
that since year ago, when the
citizens of the vicinity forced the
company to lower it's tracks to
grade, it has retaliated by refusing
to stop cars near that point and
take on passengers or allow them
to alight, unless they do SO while
the car is in motion and endanger
their lives. COuncilmen made no
comment except to refer the mat
ter
